title: euphrasia collina subsp. gunnii
intro: Euphrasia collina subsp. gunnii, also known as Gunn's eye-bright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat eye problems such as conjunctivitis and red, itchy eyes. The plant has anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated tissues, and is also used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Euphrasia collina subsp. gunnii can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
